narrative:
Defiance City 2-C (precinct in Defiance County) has 808 registered voters, with 70.5% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 15.3% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 14.1%, a narrow Republican lean of 1.2 percentage points.
